# BarGuard — Bar Inventory & Loss Detection Software
# https://barguard.app

BarGuard is a bar inventory management platform that connects POS sales data to inventory counts to calculate variance, track pour cost, and detect over-pouring or theft — shift by shift, drink by drink.

## Core Platform

- Homepage: https://barguard.app
- How It Works: https://barguard.app/how-it-works
- Features: https://barguard.app/features
- Pricing: https://barguard.app/pricing ($129/mo Basic, $249/mo Pro, $449/mo Enterprise)
- FAQ: https://barguard.app/faq
- About: https://barguard.app/about
- Contact: https://barguard.app/contact

## Key Features

- POS integrations: Square (OAuth), Toast (credentials), Clover (OAuth), Focus POS (credentials)
- POS sync every 5 minutes via Vercel Cron
- AI invoice scanning — photograph paper invoices, AI reads every line item
- Email invoice import — Gmail inbox polling for distributor invoices
- Shift-based variance calculations (Happy Hour, Dinner, Late Night)
- Per-item variance with Normal / Warning / Critical status flags
- AI-written variance summaries after every calculation
- Drink profit tracking — revenue, pour cost, and margin per menu item
- Reorder alerts — configurable per-item minimum stock thresholds
- Multi-user team access with role-based permissions (Admin, Manager, Staff)
- Team activity log — tracks who ran counts, changed roles, or invited members
- Expense receipt scanning — OCR for non-inventory receipts
- Health score dashboard — 0–100 score based on variance risk
- Partial bottle level detection via phone camera scan
